translated: And now, we've received an email just a moment ago.
Congratulations on being chosen to perform at LuckyFes.
Ibaraki is the hometown of the Onitsuka sisters and also my own hometown,
so seeing Liella live there was a dream of mine. I almost screamed at work when I saw the news!
The venue, Hitachi Seaside Park, is a place where I have many memories of school trips,
and of having barbecues with my family and friends when I was younger.
So, I'm very happy to be able to make new memories there with everyone in Liella.
I'm really looking forward to having the best time with Liella again this summer.
Next is Liella Name, Takashi-san from Sendai. Thank you.
Congratulations on your appearance at LuckyFes.
Since the festival is in Ibaraki, a place with deep ties to the series,
I think it will feel extra special.
Since it's a summer festival, please whip the crowd into a frenzy with Liella's hot performance!
I'm also looking forward to seeing if you'll perform any classic summer songs.
True. Oh, and if you have any goals for the festival
or things you'd like to try at a summer fest, I'd be happy if you could let us know.
Yes, Liella will be appearing at LuckyFes on Day 2, the 9th.
It really is the Onitsuka sisters' hometown,
and we've always wanted to perform in Ibaraki someday,
so I'm so glad it's coming true. And the other artists are just...
We'll do our best to show off Liella's power and not be outdone!
We look forward to seeing you there.
It's the middle of summer, after all.
Are we going to perform while holding sports drinks?
Well, should we do that then?
They might end up spraying everywhere.
Our bodies would be all sticky!
Please come and see us, everyone.
We look forward to seeing you!
Now then, everyone, please stay with us until the end.
Love Live! Superstar!! Yuigaoka Broadcasting Station Liella Let's Super Star!
Love Live! Superstar!! Yuigaoka Broadcasting Station Liella
This is the Yuigaoka Girls' High School Suggestion Box, where we introduce your letters.
Now then, everyone together... Ready, set, Suggestion Box!
All right, let's introduce an email.
